_meta.purpose: Treasure Master: per-map treasure/trap tiles to auto-mark in battle.
_meta.status: SCAFFOLD -- in-game-verified coordinates only. See docs/archive/treasure_master_prototype.md (HANDOFF).
_meta.how_coords_are_obtained: Hover the tile in-game, read the cursor (x,y) -- the game's on-screen coord display is ground truth (matches memory). The PSX Move-Find guide (treasure.txt) says WHICH maps/items to check, but its ASCII orientation != game (x,y) and IC differs from PSX, so every coord must be verified in-game.
_meta.schema: mapName -> { tiles: [ { x, y, kind: 'treasure'|'trap', item?: string, verified: bool } ] }
_meta.mapNameSource: Match FFTHandsFree DetectMap() / LocationNames at runtime; keys here are the IC display names.
